name: Plc Uutechnic Group Oyj
summary: Plc Uutechnic Group Oyj develops and manufactures equipment and services for enhancing production processes in the process industries worldwide. Its products include agitators, pressure vessels, process and storage tanks, reactors, and heat exchangers, as well as various types of long welded and machined axially symmetrical parts, such as rolls, cylinders, pipes, and cones. The company primarily serves hydrometallurgy and the mining, pulp, paper, and food industries, as well as the fertilizer and other chemical, and environmental technology industries. Plc Uutechnic Group Oyj is based in Uusikaupunki, Finland. As of January 12, 2021, Plc Uutechnic Group Oyj operates as a subsidiary of SPX Flow Technology Norderstedt GmbH.
